name: Internal Communications
description: Write polished internal communications including status reports, company newsletters, FAQ responses, and general announcements. Provides example templates for common communication formats used in enterprise settings, guiding Claude to produce clear, professional content aligned with organizational communication norms.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, example communication templates (3p-updates.md, company-newsletter.md, faq-answers.md, general-comms.md), and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified at skills/internal-comms/ in the repo tree.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
